backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report listing implemented features, impacted files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file mapping frontend file paths to short descriptive summaries.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global style sheet defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point setting favicon links and loading the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component assembling the site layout with Header, Hero, Products, Contact, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section showing email, phone, and WhatsApp cards plus business hours, with no address info.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with brand info, quick navigation, email/phone contacts, social links, and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with scroll detection, logo, desktop/mobile navigation, and smooth scrolling.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with background image, brand intro, CTA button, and feature highlights.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: Renders a product grid for two Multani Mitti variants with images, pricing, and a scroll-to-contact button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity, refreshing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity auth provider with login, logout, and identity lifecycle management using Dfinity AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables for light and dark themes with warm color palettes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, animations, container settings, and plugins.
project_state.json: Stores project configuration, feature requirements, and branding updates for the Tinyroot site.
